title: Claim and lease skill prose
description:
Clarify in skill prose how assignment differs from advisory leases and what the worktree claim count means.

## Background

Skill prose today does not distinguish assignment from advisory leases, does not prescribe assign-only for dependency-blocked containers, and does not note that the worktree active-claims count reflects leases rather than assignments. This is a skill-prose change only.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-18: claim and lease skill prose distinguishes assignment from advisory leases, prescribes assign-only for dependency-blocked containers, and states the active-claims count reflects leases rather than assignments.

## Notes

Edit the claim/lease skill docs; self-contained.
